ab: harem kana wari kuy adayaw mu i henan.
ch: A:老師我今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: sadu a pedped i henan kema i nani.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: harem kana wari kuy adayaw mu i ’uma.
ch: A:老師我今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: yawa ta kemangkanga?
ch: B:我們要去翻土嗎?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: yawa ta i iyan harem?
ch: A:我們今天要去哪裡?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: tuy adayaw ta i dinanuman na sinsin.
ch: B:老師要帶我們去河邊。
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: yawa ta i iyan harem kana wari?
ch: A:我們今天要去哪裡?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: tuy adayaw ta i henan na sinsi.
ch: B:老師要帶我們去山上。
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: yawa ta i dinanuman harem kana wari?
ch: A:我們今天要去河邊嗎?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: melri, tuy adayaw ta i henan na sinsi.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: yawa ta i henan harem kana wari?
ch: A:我們今天要去山上嗎?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: melri, yawa ta i ’uma harem kana wari.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: sinsi, yawa ta mena’uwa da eman i dinanuman?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: yawa ta mena’uwa da tengteng.
ch: B:我們去看蜻蜓。
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sinsi, yawa ta mena’uwa da eman i henan?
ch: A:老師，我們要到山上看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: yawa ta mena’uwa da sirusirupan.
ch: B:我們去看蝴蝶。
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: yawa ta kemudaya i ’uma?
ch: A:我們到田裡要做什麼?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: yawa ta mena’uwa data sinaleman na kudumu, kilrivak kana ’ivavureng di na valri’acengan!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: sinsi, yawa ta pakulimaya i dinanumam?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: melri, yawa ta mena’uwa da tengteng.
ch: B:不是，我們要去看蜻蜓。
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sinsi, yawa ta semalema da kulang i ’uma?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: yawa ta kemangkanga harem kana wari.
ch: B:我們今天要去翻土。
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: ulra na tengteng muviivii kadu.
ch: A:那裡有蜻蜓飛來飛去的。
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: ngawngaway ku mena’u kana vaavaaw diya na tengteng.
ch: B:我第一次看過活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: ulra na sirusirupan muviivii kadu.
ch: A+:那裡有蝴蝶飛來飛去。
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: wayi! kana vulay! sahar ku kanani na sirusirupan a!
ch: B:哇!好漂亮！我好喜歡這些蝴蝶喔！
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: ulra na sirusirupan muviivii kadiyu a!
ch: A:那邊也有蝴蝶飛來飛去喔！
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: melri na sirusirupan idu, mau na valri’acengan idu.
ch: B:那不是蝴蝶，那是蜜蜂。
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: na’una’u kani a! amana mukuwa i dawilr mu!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: ai, adi mi yawa i dawilr.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: amana pavekas, patawatawar kemakawang, munu kuretapelra’ u.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得妳跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: maranger ku pakunamun mena’u mu!
ch: B:我想趕快看到啊！
en: I want to see them right away.
